title: Global X Zero Coupon Bond 2032 ETF declares $0.17 dividend
content:
* Global X Zero Coupon Bond 2032 ETF (ZCBC [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/ZCBC]) declares $0.17/share monthly dividend [https://www.globalxetfs.com/funds/ZCBC].
 	* 30-day SEC yield of 4.33%.
 	* Payable July 7; for shareholders of record July 1; ex-div July 1.
 	* See ZCBC Dividend Scorecard, Yield Chart, & Dividend Growth. [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/ZCBC/dividends?source=news_bullet]
